A parentheses sequence is a string consisting of characters " ( " and " ) ", for example " (()(( ". A balanced parentheses sequence is a parentheses sequence which can become a valid mathematical expression after inserting numbers and operations into it, for example " (()(())) ". The balance of a parentheses sequence is defined as the number of opening parentheses " ( " minus the number of closing parentheses " ) ". For example, the balance of the sequence " (()(( " is 3.
